market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.86%, Nasdaq +1.27%, Dow +0.80%. Technology led sectors (+1.97%) while Industrials lagged (-1.21%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at -0.18%. 0 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +14.22%. Key headline: Kevin Warsh Hearing Live: Trump's Fed Chair Nominee to Face Questions from Senators — Li - WSJ — headwind for risk assets.
